item.title: Home page
item.intent: The home page must read as an editorial masthead, not a SaaS landing page. Simon's name, a one-line positioning statement, and three clear paths: the flagship series, the products, and the commentary. No hero image, no animation, no bento boxes. Let the writing be the thing. Latest series installment and latest commentary visible. Subscribe CTA present but not dominant.
item.description: Replace the scaffold index.astro with a typography-first editorial homepage. Three content paths must be visually distinct. Query content collections for latest entries. If no published content exists, handle gracefully (empty state or seed draft content).
steps: Replace scaffold index.astro with editorial masthead layout using Base.astro
Add positioning statement — one line, who Simon is and what he believes
Add three clear navigation paths linking to /series, /products, /commentary
Query series and commentary content collections; display latest of each (handle empty gracefully)

Add subscribe/newsletter CTA — present but not dominant, linking to /newsletter. The anchor text must include the literal word 'Subscribe' or 'newsletter' so build-time grep verification can confirm it rendered
Ensure no tags, no background-image CSS, no animation, no gradient, no bento grid

acceptanceCriteria.verify: npm run build && grep -q '/series' dist/index.html && grep -q '/products' dist/index.html && grep -q '/commentary' dist/index.html

acceptanceCriteria.text: Home page contains a subscribe/newsletter CTA
No img tags on the home page
